action.reasoning: Observation: 5 epochs from-scratch ResNet18 gave balanced_accuracy=0.0945 (val_acc~9%), many/medium/few shot accs 0.062/0.101/0.123. Training time ~14s, ~3s per epoch. Curves show steady but slow improvement. Analysis: Scratch training on LT data needs more epochs; standard CE + sampler insufficient for imbalance; ResNet18 capacity limited; predict.py normalize loop inefficient but functional. Decision: Upgrade to ResNet34 (~21M params), train 30 epochs (measured time OK, <1min), add inverse-frequency weighted CE loss, save best checkpoint by val_acc, fix batch normalize in predict.py, use CosineAnnealingLR with T_max=30. This balances exploration with the >20-epoch rule by submitting eval immediately after.
